scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.backend:worker: cd backend && uv run python -m app.worker.main
scripts.backend:openapi: cd backend && uv run python -m app.main --dump-openapi
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests
scripts.backend:test:api: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/api
scripts.backend:test:integration: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/integration
scripts.backend:test:unit: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/unit
scripts.backend:test:unit:cov: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing tests/unit
scripts.backend:test:cov: cd backend && uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing tests
scripts.sdk:sync: cd backend && uv run python -m app.main --dump-openapi && corepack pnpm --dir packages/ts-sdk generate
scripts.sdk:verify: corepack pnpm run sdk:typecheck && corepack pnpm run backend:test
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run frontend:test && corepack pnpm run backend:test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run frontend:build && corepack pnpm run test
